prompt_cn: 林月推开咖啡馆的门，停在窗边桌子前，侧头看向窗外的街道，眼神柔和，白色毛呢大衣自然垂落。
prompt_en: Lin Yue pushes open the cafe door and stops at the window-side table. She turns her head to gaze out at the street below
camera: expression soft and unhurried. Off-white wool coat falls naturally around her shoulders.
motion: medium tracking shot — follows from door to table
mood: slow walk-in then stop and gaze
column16: distorted face, extra fingers, watermark, low quality, blurry

prompt_cn: 特写林月低头轻笑，手指缓慢搅拌咖啡，头发垂落遮住半张脸，咖啡白雾轻轻升起。
prompt_en: Close-up of Lin Yue looking down with a faint private smile. Her fingers stir the coffee slowly. Hair falls across half her face. Steam rises from the latte in soft wisps.
camera: close-up angled from across the table
motion: subtle hand stir and gentle head tilt

prompt_cn: 陈墨推开玻璃门走进咖啡馆，目光即刻锁定到林月身上，神色复杂停顿一拍。
prompt_en: Chen Mo pushes through the glass door into the cafe. His gaze immediately finds Lin Yue. He pauses for a beat
camera: expression unreadable — recognition mixed with something heavier.
motion: medium shot from inside — shooting toward the door
mood: slow door push then still hold on face

prompt_cn: 林月缓缓抬头，目光与陈墨相遇，握杯的手指微微收紧，表情在惊讶与平静间切换。
prompt_en: Lin Yue slowly lifts her head. Her eyes meet Chen Mo's. The fingers around her cup tighten imperceptibly. Her expression shifts between surprise and composed calm.
camera: tight close-up — eye-level across the table

prompt_cn: 苏雁独自立于落地窗前，俯瞰夜色城市，手持红酒杯微旋，背影笔直，气场强势。
prompt_en: Su Yan stands alone at the floor-to-ceiling office window. She gazes down at the night city. The wine glass turns slowly between her fingers. Her posture is straight
motion: wide back shot — full window in frame
mood: still back posture with subtle wine glass rotation
column16: distorted hands, extra glasses, watermark, blur

prompt_cn: 苏雁慢慢转身，目光锐利扫过镜头，嘴角轻轻上扬，那是胸有成竹的笑。
prompt_en: Su Yan turns slowly from the window. Her sharp gaze sweeps across the frame. A measured smile forms at the corner of her lips — the smile of someone who always knows the outcome.

prompt_cn: 陈墨独立于雨中，霓虹灯映在湿漉漉的路面，他仰起头望向夜空，呼出的白气散开。
prompt_en: Chen Mo stands alone in the rain on a neon-lit street. The signs reflect in the wet asphalt. He tilts his head back to look at the night sky. His breath is visible in the cold air.
camera: low-angle medium shot — rain in foreground

prompt_cn: 极近镜头：陈墨侧脸，雨水沿轮廓流下，眼睛专注望向远方，呼吸清晰可见。
prompt_en: Extreme close-up of Chen Mo's profile. Rain runs down his jaw and jaw line. His eyes stare into the middle distance
camera: focused and unblinking. Breath visible in the cold neon-tinged air.

prompt_cn: 金伟从旋转门走出，皮质公文包提在手中，神色凝重，步伐稳健有力，大理石地面倒映身影。
prompt_en: Jin Wei steps out of the revolving door into the marble lobby. Leather briefcase in hand
camera: expression somber. Each step is measured and deliberate. His reflection runs ahead of him on the polished floor.
motion: wide tracking shot — follows from door

prompt_cn: 金伟在大堂中央停步，低头看了看手机屏幕，随即抬起头，眉头微微蹙起。
prompt_en: Jin Wei stops at the center of the lobby. He glances down at his phone screen. Then he raises his head. A faint furrow forms between his brows.
motion: stop then look down then look up

prompt_cn: 安琪坐在长椅上，书放在膝上翻开着，她抬头望向樱花飘落，嘴角浮现浅浅的笑。
prompt_en: An Qi sits on the park bench with an open book in her lap. She looks up at the falling cherry blossoms. A quiet smile forms on her lips — not for anyone else

prompt_cn: 安琪伸出手，接住一片飘落的樱花花瓣，凑近细细端详，眼中有光。
prompt_en: An Qi reaches out one hand to catch a falling cherry blossom petal. She brings it close to her eyes to examine it. There is a glimmer of something — wonder
camera: or perhaps memory — in her gaze.

prompt_cn: 林月身着红色晚礼服，在白色摄影棚缓慢旋转一圈，裙摆呈扇形飞扬，打光精准干净。
prompt_en: Lin Yue in a flowing red evening gown on a seamless white studio cyclorama. One slow 360-degree turn. The skirt fans outward in a perfect arc. Softbox key light from front-left with a hair light from behind.
camera: full-body wide shot — camera holds still
negative_prompt: watermark, low quality, distorted body, extra limbs

prompt_cn: 特写林月手腕，展示银色手镯，缓缓抬手旋转，所有细节清晰可见。
prompt_en: Extreme close-up of Lin Yue's wrist. A delicate silver bracelet catches the studio light. She slowly lifts and rotates her wrist
camera: displaying the piece from every angle. Clean white background.
column16: distorted hand, watermark, blur, extra fingers

prompt_cn: 林月手持丝绒礼品袋，侧身朝镜头伸出，仿佛递给观看者，微笑自然不做作。
prompt_en: Lin Yue holds a velvet gift bag in both hands and extends it toward the camera slightly to one side
camera: as if offering it to the viewer. Her smile is natural and warm.
mood: extend toward camera with natural smile
